items.title: Salesforce CEO’s next move could rattle $150 billion tech giant
items.description: Say what you want about Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff, but one thing is certain: He rarely mutes the mic. The veteran tech leader is perhaps the most vocal advocate for AI, championing it as the most crucial piece of the puzzle for enterprise-related growth. Also, it’s important to ...
